The number is Rs 25,224. For one person, at the lowest rungs of central government employment. And that figure does not include what pensioners lost, or what employees at higher pay levels absorbed.

This wage revision is due from November 1, 2027. The government emphasises timely conclusion to maintain industrial harmony.

articles.title: In a volatile market, odds do favour contrarians, but only if they have an edge: 4 stocks from different sectors with dividend yield of up to 5.8%
articles.description: When a fundamentally strong business is available at 4% dividend yield, the probability that you will have both dividend and the capital gains, rather than just one or the other, is materially higher than what the market is currently pricing. You are not betting on a recovery that might not come. You are betting on a recovery that, given the quality of the business and the management’s track record, has the probability skewed in your favour. In a market oscillating violently, where growth is scarce and volatility is high, that probability edge is worth looking at.

articles.title: Indian Navy MR 2026 application window closes today: Direct link to apply here
articles.description: The Indian Navy will close applications for Agniveer MR (Musician) Recruitment 2026 on April 26. Eligible candidates can apply online through the official website. The selection process includes PFT, written test, music ability assessment and medical exam. Applicants must meet age, education and marital criteria, with the written exam comprising 50 MCQs to be attempted in 30 minutes.

The Election Commission confirmed no re-polling is needed across 75,064 stations. Karur district recorded the highest turnout at 92.65%, while Anna Nagar saw the largest increase in Chennai's votes.

This expansion aims to provide power during peak demand, making renewable energy available round-the-clock.

articles.description: On April 24, India witnessed an extraordinary peak in electricity demand, reaching a staggering 252 GW as extreme heat swept across the country, compelling millions to crank up their air conditioning.
